book_title_page.description: Present only on entries where page_type='title_page'. Contains book-level metadata.

unit_preamble.description: Present on the first page of each unit, signaling the start of a new unit.

lesson_preamble.description: Present on the first page of each lesson, signaling the start of a new lesson.

BookTitlePage.description: Transcription of the book title or cover page.
BookTitlePage.title: BookTitlePage

UnitPreamble.description: Transcription of a unit opening page. Present on the first page of each unit, signaling the start of a new unit.
UnitPreamble.title: UnitPreamble

QuestionType.description: All supported practice-question types. Every type uses the same flat fields on PracticeQuestion, but options and guide_answer are interpreted by type: free_form -> options null; guide_answer is a single-element list with answer text. multiple_choice -> options is a list of option texts; guide_answer is a single-element list with the correct option text. checkbox -> options is a list of option texts; guide_answer is a list of all correct option texts. fill_in_the_blanks -> options null; blanks are marked ___1___, ___2___, etc.; guide_answer is the ordered list of blank values. annotate -> options null; guide_answer is a single-element list for the answer content. matching -> options contains left items, then '---', then right items; guide_answer is a list of 'left_text:right_text' pairs. create_table -> options null; guide_answer is a single-element list containing the answer content which can be a markdown table.
QuestionType.title: QuestionType

difficulty.description: Difficulty level of the question. Always null.

question_type.description: Determines how options and guide_answer are interpreted. See QuestionType for the full per-type contract.

guide_pdf_page.description: PDF page index where the guide or teacher-edition answer appears.
guide_pdf_page.title: Guide Pdf Page

setup_text.description: Shared introductory text that applies to a group of related questions.
setup_text.title: Setup Text

question.description: Question text. For fill_in_the_blanks, blanks are denoted ___1___, ___2___, etc. (1-indexed).
question.title: Question

options.description: Answer options when applicable. multiple_choice and checkbox: list of option texts. matching: left-column items, then '---', then right-column items. All other types: null.
options.title: Options

question_images.description: Bounding boxes of images that are part of the question.
question_images.title: Question Images

guide_answer.description: Correct answer values. Interpretation depends on question_type: free_form -> single-element list with answer text; multiple_choice -> single-element list with correct option text; checkbox -> list of all correct option texts; fill_in_the_blanks -> ordered list of blank values ('___1___' maps to index 0); annotate -> single-element list for answer content; matching -> list of 'left_text:right_text' pairs; create_table -> single-element list with the answer content which can be a markdown table.
guide_answer.title: Guide Answer

guide_answer_images.description: Bounding boxes of guide images that show the answer.
guide_answer_images.title: Guide Answer Images
